title: cyperus cataractarum
intro: Cyperus cataractarum, also known as the Himalayan umbrella sedge, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing swelling and pain, treating wounds and skin conditions, and acting as an antipyretic to reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the rhizomes and roots of Cyperus cataractarum are typically dried and used in decoctions or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
